title: Civil servants exit another office space under £94m programme
body: "The Government Property Agency (GPA) is set to secure a further £8.8 million in annual savings with the imminent closure of another Civil Service office space in London.  On Thursday (November 27) all civil servants based at 10 Victoria Street officially completed their departure from the building, which is the third workspace being closed as part of the government’s Plan for London.  Approximately 1,000 staff from a number of Civil Service departments, including the Cabinet Office, had occupied the space.  Read the full press release on the Government Property Agency website. "
